programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A couple with two young kids are in the process of growing their family through adoption; they both grew up near Mississippi's Barnett Reservoir and want to find a home with more space while fulfilling their lifelong dream of living on the water.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Two siblings look for a waterfront vacation home on Long Lake, Wis., so they can give their kids the same great memories they had growing up.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A pair of newlyweds searches southeast Michigan for a lakeside retreat where they can plant roots and start a family.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A couple searches for a vacation home in a friendly community along the shores of Lake Eufaula, Okla., for their children to enjoy.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: A couple from Long Island, New York, wants to find a beachfront getaway in Eleuthera, Bahamas, where they both can relax.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.sub_title: Fortifying a Family in Fort Pierce
programs.desc: In order to give its family a place to stay connected as it grows and moves away, a couple searches for a beachfront home in Fort Pierce, Fla.
